---
title: "Analyze Manuload CO2 Data"
author: "Nolan Adams"
format: html
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

## Analysis of Co2 at Manuloa over time

This analysis will look at the concentration of C02 at Manuloa Observatory over time

```{r}
#| label: loadpackages-and-data

# load packages
library("dplyr")
library("ggplot2")

# load data
mlo_data <- read.csv("data/monthly_in_situ_co2_mlo_cleaned.csv")
```


Now data is loaded, we will make a plot of time on the x axis and C02 concentration on the y axis using plot


```{r}
#| label: plot-co2

# make the plot
mlo_data %>%
  filter(CO2 > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Date.1,
             y = CO2)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "C02 Concentration at MLO over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Carbon Dioxide Concentration")

```
